auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Solcast API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header. Get it after signing in to the Solcast API Toolkit: https://toolkit.solcast.com.au/

actions.name: get_radiation_and_weather_forecast
actions.description: Get Solcast irradiance and weather forecasts for a latitude and longitude up to 14 days ahead.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

hours.description: Time window of the response in hours from 1 to 336.

period.description: Length of the averaging period in ISO 8601 duration format.

output_parameters.description: Comma-separated Solcast output parameter names to include in each record.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Solcast irradiance and weather forecasts.

period_end.description: The inclusive end timestamp for the returned averaging period.

period.description: The ISO 8601 averaging duration for this record.

items.description: One Solcast time-series record keyed by the requested output parameters.

message.description: Solcast response message returned when the request succeeds without record data.

actions.name: get_radiation_and_weather_historic
actions.description: Get Solcast irradiance and weather historical estimated actuals for a latitude and longitude from 2007 through 7 days ago.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

start.description: ISO 8601 start timestamp for the historical request. If the value omits a timezone, Solcast infers it from time_zone or assumes UTC.

end.description: ISO 8601 end timestamp for the historical request. Provide either end or duration.

duration.description: ISO 8601 duration for the historical request. Provide either duration or end.

period.description: Length of the averaging period in ISO 8601 duration format.

output_parameters.description: Comma-separated Solcast output parameter names to include in each historical record.

time_zone.description: Timezone used for returned timestamps. Use utc, longitudinal, or a UTC offset from -13 to 13 in 0.25 hour increments.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Solcast irradiance and weather historical estimated actuals.

period_end.description: The inclusive end timestamp for the returned averaging period.

period.description: The ISO 8601 averaging duration for this record.

items.description: One Solcast time-series record keyed by the requested output parameters.

message.description: Solcast response message returned when the request succeeds without record data.

actions.name: get_radiation_and_weather_live_estimated_actuals
actions.description: Get Solcast irradiance and weather live estimated actuals for a latitude and longitude over the past 7 days.

latitude.description: Latitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

longitude.description: Longitude in decimal degrees using EPSG:4326.

hours.description: Time window of the response in hours from 1 to 168.

period.description: Length of the averaging period in ISO 8601 duration format.

output_parameters.description: Comma-separated Solcast output parameter names to include in each record.

inputSchema.description: Input parameters for Solcast irradiance and weather live estimated actuals.

period_end.description: The inclusive end timestamp for the returned averaging period.

period.description: The ISO 8601 averaging duration for this record.

items.description: One Solcast time-series record keyed by the requested output parameters.

message.description: Solcast response message returned when the request succeeds without record data.
